nodes.title: Project Definition
nodes.description: Define business objectives, KPIs, stakeholders, and ROI.
nodes.educational_rationale: Alignment with business value is the critical first step to avoid 'vanity' twin projects.

nodes.title: Asset Audit
nodes.description: Inventory assets, IDs, metadata, and maintenance history.
nodes.educational_rationale: Clean master data is the foundation of your digital twin strategy.

nodes.title: BIM Integration
nodes.description: Import IFC/Revit and map semantic objects to the digital twin.
nodes.educational_rationale: BIM provides the essential spatial anchor for your digital twin context.

nodes.title: IoT Connectivity
nodes.description: Connect MQTT, OPC-UA, BACnet, or Modbus sensors.
nodes.educational_rationale: Protocol choice dictates latency and reliability in industrial environments.

nodes.title: Data Pipeline
nodes.description: Establish Sensors → Edge → Broker → Data Lake flow.
nodes.educational_rationale: A robust broker like Kafka or MQTT is required for guaranteed message delivery.

nodes.title: Normalization
nodes.educational_rationale: Normalization at the Edge prevents downstream data drift in your AI models.

nodes.title: Twin Construction
nodes.description: Structure: Building → Floor → Room → Equipment → Sensor.
nodes.educational_rationale: Strict semantic hierarchies are mandatory for scalable enterprise integration.

nodes.title: AI & Physics Simulation
nodes.description: Apply ML predictive maintenance and simulation models.
nodes.educational_rationale: Physics-based models explain the 'Why', ML models predict the 'When'.

nodes.title: Enterprise Integration
nodes.description: Integrate ERP, CMMS, GIS, and BMS systems.
nodes.educational_rationale: Twin data is useless if it remains siloed from the work order system.

nodes.title: Predictive Closed Loop
nodes.description: If RUL < 14, trigger automated work orders.
nodes.educational_rationale: Automated closed-loop action minimizes MTTR (Mean Time to Repair).
